data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. TIGER MOTH has found the minor placings here at last couple of runs, finishing second last time beaten 4.5 lengths (22.70). Strong form has emerged from his last run. Well placed and gets his chance. 2. PAW VANNA rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (22.53) at this track over 390m. Didn't win last time but still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Overdue and is among the main hopes. 7. PAW QATAR has shown good improvement at his last two starts, finishing in the money last time when 2nd at Ballarat over 390m. Ready to find winning form. 4. KRAKEN BLUEY can improve on an unplaced run here last time out.","runners":[1,2,7,4],"exclusive":false}
